question: Simple Mail Transfer Protocol (SMTP)
canonical_answer:
Used to send a receive email across the Internet. This protocol has several-well known vulnerabilities that make it inherently insecure. _________ operates on TCP/ UDP port 25. ________ over SSL/ TLS (SMTPS) uses TCP/ UDP port 465.

*Hint: term is the same for all blanks

appears_in.title: Comptia A+ Core 1 Study Guide
appears_in.answer: A protocol used to retrieve email from a mail server. POP3 is a later iteration of the POP protocol, and can be used with or without SMTP. Port 110

appears_in.title: Comptia Fundamentals Study Guide
appears_in.answer: A protocol in the TCP/IP suite designed to send email that uses port 25.

appears_in.title: Tia Cissp
appears_in.answer:
Used to send a receive email across the Internet. This protocol has several-well known vulnerabilities that make it inherently insecure. _________ operates on TCP/ UDP port 25. ________ over SSL/ TLS (SMTPS) uses TCP/ UDP port 465.

*Hint: term is the same for all blanks

appears_in.title: When Does Comptia Security+ 601 Expire
appears_in.answer: Transport mail between mail servers; TCP port 25
